svg.title: Anatomy of a JavaScript class fully labeled
svg.desc: Shows class keyword name constructor this properties and methods with color coded leader lines and explanations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the class keyword do in JavaScript?')

g.text: runs automatically when new is used
